title: SYNTHETIC FAR compliance determination (applies+passes / applies+fails)
description: SYNTHETIC fixture (M4-T003 RH-S7): computes a maximum floor area from the lot area and a FAR, then TESTS a proposed floor area against that computed limit, emitting a genuine compliance pass/fail determination. Proves the engine can express applies+passes AND applies+fails (a real constraint check, not just a limit computation) WITHOUT changing coverage. Illustrative value; not a Verified determination.

citations.quote: SYNTHETIC (not verbatim from any source): for M4-T003 engine-hardening demonstrations only - effective-date temporal selection and a compliance pass/fail determination. Illustrative values; never a legal statement.

inputs.name: zoning_district
inputs.description: District governing the lot (scope via applicability).

inputs.name: proposed_floor_area_sq_ft
inputs.description: Proposed residential floor area to test against the computed maximum (must be > 0).

outputs.name: max_floor_area_sq_ft
outputs.description: Maximum floor area = lot area x FAR.

steps.note: Maximum floor area = lot area x FAR.

determination.description: Proposed floor area must not exceed the computed maximum.

limitations: SYNTHETIC compliance-determination demonstration; illustrative value; requires official capture + G6 before any use.
